Some species within this genus have been found to possess potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, Epicranthes species are used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
